content_body:
Just 90 miles north of Atlanta, Blue Ridge offers a refreshing change of pace during the winter months. With its scenic mountain beauty and quaint charm, your Hallmark-esque vacation awaits in Blue Ridge. Offering the feel of cool winter weather without the crushing chill, North Georgia strikes the perfect balance for a memorable winter getaway.

What Winter Is Like in Blue Ridge, GA

Temperatures hover in the mid 40s-50s during the day and low 30s at night. Spend your evenings in the hot tub or by the fireplace and sip your morning coffee overlooking the mountains while wrapped in a fuzzy throw blanket.

Snowfall tends to come January-February, but December flakes are still possible! The mountains become that much more magical when dusted with white powder.

Frosty sunrises create breathtaking views to wake up to while enjoying the warmth of your flannel pajamas.

Top Things To Do in Blue Ridge, GA in Winter


View of Brasstown Bald

Blue Ridge offers activities year-round, so there's never a dull moment in the North Georgia mountains. The slower season brings quieter hiking trails, warm spa days, and experiences for every age.

  • Winter Hikes
    Explore easy-to-moderate trails like Fall Branch Falls, Brasstown Bald, and Long Creek Falls. These hikes are easy to reach via car and boast jaw-dropping views that will leave your camera roll full of memories.
  • Fly Fishing & Outdoor Sports
    Local activities like Toccoa River Outfitters and Noontootla Creek Farms offer year-round guided fly fishing and clay shooting, respectively.
  • Downtown Shopping & Wine Bars
    Spend an afternoon browsing boutiques, art galleries, and upscale bars and restaurants. Downtown Blue Ridge is known for its walkability!
  • Spa Experiences
    Serenity in the Mountains offers heated stone massages, spa packages, and even a salt cave ideal for relaxation with a dose of pampering.

Best Winter Activities in Blue Ridge, GA for Couples or Families

The beauty of Blue Ridge activities is that there's always something around the bend. As a flexible travel destination, Blue Ridge is scattered with family-friendly things to do and romantic activities for couples.

For Couples:

  • Wine tasting at Roo Mountain Vineyards, Living Water, or Kerith House Winery
  • Upscale dining at Grace, Ferraro's, or Kuro Koi
  • Enjoying an in-cabin massage at your private luxury cabin

For Families:

  • Ice skating at Blue Ridge on Ice
  • Christmas train rides on the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway
  • Kid-Friendly attractions in downtown like mini golf, escape rooms, and pinball arcades downtown

Fill the quiet mountain air with the laughter and joy of your loved ones as they explore the region.

Best Winter Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge, GA


Chase Mountain Dreams

A winter vacation is framed by the luxury cabin rental you choose. It is the warmth that embraces you when you walk in the door, and the bittersweetness when you depart. From panoramic mountain views and covered hot tubs to King Suites and indoor/outdoor fireplaces, our Blue Ridge cabin collection create the perfect backdrop for your getaway.

Whether you reserve a romantic holiday cabin for two or a grand Christmas cabin for twelve, lasting memories will be made during your Blue Ridge experience.

Perfect for a Winter Escape: Riverfront and Mountain View Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA

Winter is the season to slow down and hibernate, and nothing epitomizes that experience quite like a luxury cabin surrounded by mountain scenery.


Above the Timberline

Mountain-view cabins offer:

  • Breathtaking views that change every day
  • Window walls to bring the outdoors in
  • Front row seats to brilliant stargazing


The Rivers Edge

Riverfront cabins boast:

  • A peaceful soundtrack for your stay
  • Fly fishing just steps away
  • Outdoor fireplaces or fire pits overlooking the river

These spaces create an atmosphere where families bond and couples fall in love all over again.

Luxury Blue Ridge Cabin Rentals for Christmas and New Years

The holidays were meant for the mountains, and Blue Ridge shines brightly during Christmas and New Years. Several of our luxury cabins are decorated for the season and hold fireplaces, open floor-plans, and beautiful views to create a Hallmark-worthy setting for your family. Learn more about our Christmas cabins here. 

Why Cabin Rentals of Georgia Offers the Best Winter Cabins in Blue Ridge, GA

It has been a joy to create memorable experiences for our guests from near and far over the last 22 years. Our curated cabins and attentive team continually offer 5-star vacations to Blue Ridge.

Guests choose us for:

  • Immaculate, clean properties
  • Local knowledge of the best Blue Ridge activities
  • Prompt and thoughtful communication
  • Luxury cabins with convenient locations and top-tier amenities

Whether you are escaping for a quick winter weekend or planning a week-long holiday getaway, we’re here to help you craft a personalized getaway you’ll remember for years to come. Call us at (706) 432-2140!
title: Blue Ridge GA Winter Travel Guide
